verses.text: Joab kiangah, “En in, Absalom' hangin kumpipa kapin thum hi,” ci-in kigen hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-a gualzawhna mi khempeuh-a' dingin thumna hong suak mawk hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in mite in, “Kumpipa a tapa' hangin dah hi,” ci-in za uh hi
Tua ciangin galsung pan a tai uh ciangin a maizum mite a gel bangin tua ni-in khuapi sungah mite simlut uh hi
Kumpipa in a mai khuh a, nakpi takin kapkhia-in, “Aw ka tapa Absalom! Aw Absalom! Ka tapa, ka tapa!” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa' inn sungah Joab hong pai-in, “Tuni-in nangma nuntakna, na tanute leh na tapate' nuntakna, na zite leh na zineute' nuntakna a hong honkhia na nasemte khempeuh na maizumsak hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in nang hong mudahte it-in nang hong itte na mudah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ukte leh nasemte nang-a' dingin bangmah ahihlohna tuni-in na kitelsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Absalom hing-in kote khempeuh tuni-in si le ung na nuam ding ka thei hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ding in, paikhia in la na nasemte tungah kamneem pau in; bang hang hiam cih leh na pai kei leh tuzan ciangin mi khat zong nang kiangah hong om nawnlo ding hi, ci-in Topa' min tawh ka kiciam ngam hi. Hih thu pen na tangval-a kipan tu ciangdong na tungah hong tungsa siatna khempeuh sangin nang-a' dingin siazaw ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa dingin kulhkongpi gei-ah a tu hi. Tua ciangin mite kiangah, “En un, kulhkongpi-ah kumpipa tu hi,” ci-in kigen a, tua ciangin kumpipa mai-ah mi khempeuh hong pai uh hi.

Israel minam khempeuh sungah mi khempeuh thu kisel uh a, “Kumpipa in i galte' khutsung panin hong khahkhia-in Filistia-te' khutsung panin hong honkhia hi. Tu-in Absalom' hangin i gamsung panin amah taikhia hi
Ahih hangin eite' tungah sathau i nilh Absalom, gal sungah si khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in bang hangin kumpipa lakkik ding bangmah genlo na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi David in hih thu, siampi Zadok leh Abiathar kiangah puakin, “Judah upate kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Israel-te khempeuh' thu kumpipa kiangah tung khin hi. Bang hangin note in kumpipa a inn-ah a ciahpih nunung pen hi ding na hi uh hiam
Note pen ka behnai na hi uh a, note pen keima si keima sa na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin kumpipa a ciahpih nunung pen hi ding na hi uh hiam?’ ci un

Tua ciangin Amasa kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima si keima sa hilo na hi hiam? Tu-a kipan Joab' munah nang pen ka galkapte a ukpa na hih kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen, ci hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi
David' thugen in Judah mite khempeuh' lungsim thakhatin zo pah hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah thu puakin, “Nang leh na nasemte khempeuh hong ciahkik un,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jordan-ah kumpipa hong paikik hi. Kumpipa a dawn ding leh Jordan galah kumpipa a paipih dingin Gilgal-ah Judah mite hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin Bahurim panin Benjamin mi Gera' tapa Shimei, Kumpi David a dawn dingin Judah mite tawh manlangin paisuk hi
Benjamin sung panin mi tul khat amah tawh om hi. Tua ciangin Saul' innsung nasem Ziba, a tapa sawmlenga leh a nasem sawmnihte tawh kumpipa' mai Jordan-ah taisuk a
kumpipa' innkuante a galkahpih ding leh ama deih bangin na a sem dingin amaute in ngahmun ngap uh hi. Jordan a galkah ding ciangin Gera' tapa Shimei kumpipa' mai-ah boksukin
kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in Jerusalem na nusiat ni-in na nasempa' gamtat khialhna ka topa in hong mawhsak kei in la, hong ciamteh kei in; kumpipa in ngaihsutin nei kei in

Bang hang hiam cih leh ka khialh khitna na nasempa in ka thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin, en in, ka to kumpipa a dawn dingin a hong paisuk dingin Josef minam khempeuh sung panin a masa penin tuni-in kong tung hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nu Zeruiah ahi Abishai hong paukhia a, “Amah in Topa' sathau nilhpa samsia ahih manin hih thu hangin Shimei thah ding hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Ahih hangin David in, “Note pen tuni-in kei' lang bangin na omna dingun no Zeruiah' tapate tawh kei bang kisai ihi hiam? Tuni-in Israel sungah mi khatpeuh kithat ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in Israel-te' tungah kumpi ka hihna thei hilo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Shimei kiangah, “Nang na si kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in ama tungah kiciamna a bawl hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa a dawn dingin Saul' tupa Mefibosheth hong paisuk hi. Kumpipa a paikhiat ni-a kipan lungnuamin hong tun'kik ni dong, amah in a khete zeemlo, a khamul puahlo, a puante zong sawplo hi
Jerusalem panin kumpipa a dawn dingin hong pai ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Mefibosheth aw, bang hangin kei hong zuilo na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in dawngin, “Ka topa! Aw Kumpipa, ka nasempa in kei hong khem hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na nasempa in ama kiangah, ‘Kei a tungah tuangin kumpipa ka zuih theihna dingin kei-a' dingin la khat tutphah vawh in,’ ka ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasempa a khe bai hi
Amah in ka to kumpipa kiangah na nasempa hong gensia hi. Ahih hangin ka to kumpipa pen Pasian' vantung mi tawh kibang hi. Tua ahih ciangin hoih na sak bangin hong hih in

Bang hang hiam cih leh ka to kumpipa' mai-ah ka pa' innkuante khempeuh a si zah dong dingin a sia ahi hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in na sabuai-ah a ne mite lakah na nasempa na hong koih hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa tungah ka koh ding thudang bang neithuah nawn ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nangma thu gen lailai na hi hiam? Ka lungsim ka khentatzo hi; nang leh Ziba in leitang na hawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mefibosheth in kumpipa kiangah, “Aw, ka to kumpipa lungnuamin inn hong tung khin na hih nungsang, a vekin amah lasak in,” a ci hi
Rogelim panin Gilead mi Barzillai zong hong paisuk hi. Jordan galkhatah amah a kha dingin kumpipa tawh Jordan ciangdong amah paisuak hi
Barzillai pen kum sawmgiat a pha, a khangham mahmah mi khat ahi hi. Mahanaim-ah kumpipa a om laitakin amah in an pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah mihau mahmah khat ahi hi
Kumpipa in Barzillai kiangah, “Kei hong zui in la, Jerusalem-ah kei tawh hong om in, nang kong vak ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Barzillai in kumpipa kiangah, “Kei, kumpipa tawh Jerusalem-ah a paito dingin ka nuntak ding kum bangzah hun nei nawn ka hi hiam

Tuni-in kei kum sawmgiat ka pha ta a, a nuam leh a nuamlo khentel thei nawn ka hi hiam? Na nasempa in a nek ahi a, a dawn ahi zongin a limna phawk thei nawn ka hi hiam? Lasa numeite leh lasa pasalte' aw za thei nawn ka hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin ka to kumpipa tungah na nasempa vangik kibehlap hong hi ding ka hi hiam
Na nasempa in Jordan galkhatah tomkha sung kumpipa hong zui ding hi. Kei pen tua bang hamphatna lianpi a ngah dingin zong ka kilawm kei hi

Keima khuapi sung mah, ka nu leh ka pa' han nai-ah ka sih theihna dingin na nasempa hong ciahsak kik in, ci-in kong thum hi. Ahih hangin hih lai-ah ka tapa na nasempa Khimham om hi; ka to kumpipa tawh amah galkah sak in; hoih na sak bangbangin ama-a' ding hihsak in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in dawngin, “Khimham in kei hong zui ding a, nangmah in hoih na sak bangbangin ama-a' ding ka hihsak ding hi; kei tung panin na deih khempeuh nangma-a' dingin kong hihsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin mi khempeuh Jordan galah pai uh a, kumpipa zong a pai hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Barzillai namin thupha pia a, ama inn-ah amah a ciah hi
Gilgal-ah kumpipa paisuak a, amah tawh Khimham paisuak hi. Judah mi khempeuh, leh Israel mi a kimkhatte in zong ama paina dingah kumpipa a kha uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh hong pai-in kumpipa kiangah, “Bang hangin ka sanggam uh Judah mite in nang hong gukhia-in, kumpipa leh a innkuante, leh David' mite amah tawh, Jordan galah paipih ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi

Judah mite khempeuh in Israel mite dawngin, “Kumpipa pen kote tawh beh kinai ahihna hang ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin hih thu-ah heh na hi uh hiam? Kumpipa' sum bei-in an ne peuhmah ka hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh amah in letsong khat peuhpeuh kote hong pia ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel mite in Judah mite dawngin, “Kumpipa sungah tanh sawm ka nei uh a, David' sungah note khempeuh sangin tam ka neizaw uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin note in kote hong simmawh na hi uh hiam? Kote pen i kumpipa ciahpih kik ding a gen masate hilo ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite' kammal sangin Judah mite' kammal kihtakhuai zaw hi.
